sphuṭita p. p. [sphuṭ-kta]
1 Burst, broken open, split, cracked;  Māl. 9. 31. 
2 Budded, blown, expanded (as a flower);  U. 3. 24. 
3 Made clear, manifested, shown.
4 Torn, destroyed.
5 Laughed at,
Comp.
— caraṇa a. having wide feet. splay-footed.
